summary: Upgraded 13 legacy jobs across two dispatch-framework boards to OQE 2.0 compliance. Renamed 5 bare numeric IDs to PROJECT-WORKTYPE-#### format. Declared meta.oqe_version 2.0 on both boards.

id_renames.subject: Redesign Morning Briefing visual product and update PDF generation pipeline to new standard
id_renames.worktype_rationale: UI is the dominant deliverable (visual product + renderer); UI is registered in dispatch-framework/scripts/job-board.py VALID_WORKTYPES; DESIGN appears in §13 docs but not in the runtime VALID_WORKTYPES so UI was chosen for gate alignment

id_renames.subject: Redesign Dashboard composite views and update server renderers to new standard
Redesign Intelligence Brief visual format and update Relay pipeline to new standard
Design Grocery Reorder visual dashboard and build rendering pipeline
Design Solar Performance composite dashboard and build data pipeline

cross_reference_audit.scope: Workspace-wide grep for active references to the 5 renamed bare-numeric IDs and the 8 JOB-#### IDs in scope
cross_reference_audit.result: No active live references found outside the source boards. The few matches in venv/idna and SVG markers were unrelated single-character noise. DISPATCH_LOG.json historical references preserved per §13 closed-jobs exemption.

non_renamed_legacy_ids.scope: JOB-0014, JOB-0016, JOB-0017, JOB-0018, JOB-0019, JOB-0020, JOB-0021, JOB-0022 — left as JOB-#### format
non_renamed_legacy_ids.rationale: WS-GOV-0066 criterion 4 explicitly enumerates only ('2','3','4','5','6') as renames in scope. JOB-#### legacy format is a validator WARNING per dispatch/dashboard/server.cjs validateJobOqe2 (line 1941 LEGACY_ID test produces warnings array, not violations). Criterion 7 requires 0 violations; warnings are acceptable. A separate future job can take up the JOB-#### → DFR-WORKTYPE-#### migration if desired.

validator_run.executed: node validateJobOqe2 inline against both files
validator_run.warnings_detail: Each of the 8 JOB-#### IDs produces one project_worktype_job_ids §13 warning per validator design. Per the validator code (server.cjs line 1940-1943), legacy ID format is a WARNING not a VIOLATION. Criterion 7 of WS-GOV-0066 specifies zero violations; warnings are out of scope.

standing_scan.note: The standing scan does not currently scan dispatch-framework/coordination/JOB_BOARD.json (DEFAULT_ROOTS gap). Direct validateJobOqe2 invocation confirmed zero violations on all 8 coordination-board jobs in scope.

rollback: Restore both .bak-2026-04-26-WS-GOV-0066 files in place to revert.
